# MatFlow

MatFlow is a modern class scheduling and gym management platform built for Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, MMA, Muay Thai, and fitness academies.

It allows gym owners and coaches to manage class schedules, handle student sign-ups, track real-time capacity, and collect payments — all from a single web-based dashboard. A core feature is a public embeddable class schedule that any gym can drop onto their Webflow, Squarespace, or custom website with two lines of HTML.

MatFlow replaces ad-hoc systems — Google Sheets, WhatsApp group chats, manual invoices — with a purpose-built platform designed for martial arts academies that want a professional student experience without the complexity of enterprise gym software.

## Reference Pages

- Homepage: https://mat-flow.net/
  Main landing page. Explains the product value proposition with a video sales letter. Primary CTA is free trial sign-up via /login.

- Login: https://mat-flow.net/login
  Magic-link authentication entry point for gym owners, coaches, and students. No passwords — users receive a sign-in link by email.

- Schedule Embed: https://mat-flow.net/embed/schedule/{gymSlug}
  Public, read-only class schedule for a specific gym identified by its slug. Designed to be embedded inside an <iframe> on any external website. Auto-resizes via postMessage. No login required to view.

- LLM Reference: https://mat-flow.net/llms.txt
  This file. Machine-readable description of MatFlow for AI agents and LLM crawlers.

## Key Features

- Live embeddable class schedule (two-line iframe widget, auto-resizes, works on Webflow, Squarespace, Wix, WordPress, Carrd, and any HTML page)
- Real-time capacity tracking — students see spots remaining; classes close automatically when full
- Student self-service sign-ups via passwordless magic link (no account creation friction)
- Coach and admin dashboard with roster, attendance tracking, and belt progress
- Stripe-powered membership billing and drop-in payments with automatic recurring charges
- Automated email and SMS reminders for class sign-ups, no-shows, and quiet students
- Multi-gym support — one platform account can manage multiple gym locations
- Rich class descriptions with photos, instructor bios, videos, and custom CTAs

## Target Users

- **Primary:** Gym owners and head coaches running Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, MMA, Muay Thai, wrestling, or general fitness academies
- **Secondary:** Small to mid-size martial arts schools (5–300 students) replacing manual systems like WhatsApp, Google Sheets, or Mindbody
- **Use case:** Coaches who want a public-facing live schedule embedded on their own website without building custom software or paying for expensive enterprise platforms

## Technical Notes

- Built on Next.js 15 (App Router) with a Supabase (PostgreSQL) backend
- Authentication: passwordless magic links via Supabase Auth OTP
- Payments: Stripe integration for recurring memberships and one-off drop-ins
- Schedule embed: standard <iframe> with postMessage-based auto-resize; Content-Security-Policy allows cross-origin framing
- Data isolation: all gym data is fully isolated per tenant; no cross-gym data access is possible
- Hosting: Vercel (edge-optimized, global CDN)
